name: Parmesan Fish Saute-WW >-}Dgsv43a
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Fish (haddock, flounder or sole fillets)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine buttermilk and Parmesan cheese; set aside.
2. In a separate small bowl, mix flour with salt, onion powder, garlic powder, and pepper; set aside.
3. Place cornmeal on a sheet of waxed paper or a paper plate.
4. Sprinkle the flour mixture over the fish fillets (haddock, flounder, or sole).
5. Dip each fillet into buttermilk mixture, coating both sides completely and using all the mixture.
6. Dip the fillets into cornmeal, turning to coat both sides and pressing firmly to ensure it adheres.
7. In a 12-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
8. Add fish fillets to the hot oil and cook until golden brown on the bottom, about 3 minutes.
9. Carefully turn the fillets over and cook until the other side is golden brown and the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
